title: Totem Dio Za Warudo
description: make your totem look like Dio Za Warudo
body:
Totem Dio Za Warudo is a simple and fun Minecraft resourcepack that replaces the default Totem of Undying texture with a design inspired by Dio Brando from JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure.

When you revive using the totem, you’ll see a stylish, anime-themed texture referencing Dio’s iconic moment — “Za Warudo!”.
